text:
ashish      2010-07-07 15:27:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/minitunes      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    audio/minitunes/files patch-src-collectionscanner.h 
  Log:
  Minitunes is just another music player, only better.
  Minitunes unclutters your music listening experience with a clean and
  innovative interface.
  
  WWW:    http://flavio.tordini.org/minitunes
  
  PR:             ports/148404
  Submitted by:   Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin at googlemail.com>
  Approved by:    pgj, tabthorpe (mentors)
  Feature safe:   yes
